prompt: Use dev-workflow-kit to decide whether this request needs planning, debugging, CI triage, or release checks.
Use the planning skill from dev-workflow-kit before we implement this multi-step feature.
Use change-impact-analysis from dev-workflow-kit to show which modules and clients this change could affect.
Use architecture-refactor-guidance from dev-workflow-kit before we split this module into cleaner boundaries.
Use incident-observability-triage from dev-workflow-kit to triage this production alert using logs and metrics.
Use dependency-compliance-audit from dev-workflow-kit to review whether this package is safe to adopt and compatible with policy.
Use api-contract-compatibility-review from dev-workflow-kit to check whether this endpoint change breaks old clients.
Use release-rollout-strategy from dev-workflow-kit and give me checkpoints, rollback triggers, and rollout sequencing.
Use fix-ci instead of general debugging because the only failure is in the pipeline type-check job.
Use dependency-compliance-audit rather than security-review because the main question is license and supply-chain fit.
Use ship-readiness from dev-workflow-kit and tell me what is left before merge.
Explain what software delivery means without changing files.
